chunks.title: Elijah Taken to Heaven and Elisha Inherited His Spirit
chunks.reason: This section covers the journey from Gilgal to the Jordan, Elijah's ascension in a whirlwind, Elisha's request for a double portion, his validation of the spirit through the Jordan crossing, and the prophets' confirmation.

chunks.title: Elisha Purifies the Waters at Jericho
chunks.reason: This unit describes the men of Jericho complaining about bad water and Elisha's miracle of purification using salt.

chunks.title: Elisha Cursed by Young Men at Bethel
chunks.reason: This segment details the mockery of young men at Bethel, Elisha's curse resulting in two bears attacking them, and his subsequent travel to Carmel and Samaria.
